chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C. P No.S-385 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-10-2025 Mr. Kamran Ahmed Gorar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State. Respondents No.5 and 6 present in person. ************** Learned Assistant Advocate General files comments/statements on behalf of official respondents No.2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 8, which are taken on record. Copies thereof have been supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner contends that the official respondents, at the behest of private respondents No.5 to 7, are allegedly harassing the petitioner and issuing threats, compelling him to sell his house at a low price. He, therefore, prays for protection. Respondents No.5 and 6, who are present in Court, undertake that they have neither caused any harassment to the petitioner nor do they intend to do so in future, and that they shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned Assistant Advocate General submits that the official respondents are duty-bound to act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioner, if and when required. Learned counsel for the petitioner, after going through the comments/statements filed by the official respondents, does not press the petition on merits but reiterates his request for protection. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law, to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner, and to provide protection to him as and when required.

Learned counsel for the petitioner, after going through the comments/statements filed by the official respondents, does not press the petition on merits but reiterates his request for protection. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law, to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner, and to provide protection to him as and when required. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to the learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, as well as to the official respondents concerned for information and necessary compliance. Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
